description: A portrait-format graphic. A white panel at the top carries blue serif text reading SEATTLE, WA above red italic text reading WORST OF THE WORST. The center shows a portrait of an adult man with short dark hair and a goatee in a gray t-shirt, set against a faded corridor background. A lower section with a pale Seattle skyline includes a red FELONY ARREST tag, italic blue text reading Convicted for second degree rape of a child, a Department of Homeland Security seal, and large red and blue text reading ARRESTED and ICE.
notable_text: SEATTLE, WA; WORST OF THE WORST; FELONY ARREST; Convicted for second degree rape of a child; ARRESTED; ICE
